title: Nightmare Realms
description: Nightmare Realms: Where Fear Comes Alive! Explore Terrifying Worlds with Scary Monsters and Haunting Mods!
body:
![Nightmare Realms ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/579306f80c605b6a92aac5f5f435762a435701c2.png)

![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d28737c8a95bedc14f96408e1ce23d03e659ac4.png)

### Explore Terrifying Worlds with Scary Monsters and Haunting Mods!

![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d28737c8a95bedc14f96408e1ce23d03e659ac4.png)
💖 Better On Hardcore with the recommended shaders!!
![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d28737c8a95bedc14f96408e1ce23d03e659ac4.png)
![Nightmare Realms Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dd0ae92960d6c63eccfd0ea25e8ddf15d83eeb2.png)


> 👻 New UI

> 👻 New Dimensions

> 👻 New Structures

> 👻 New Creatures

> 👻 New Guards

> 👻 New Monsters

> 👻 Jumpscares

> 👻 Zombie Apocalypse

> 👻 New Armor, Weapons like Guns and More!

> 👻 Better Combat

> 👻 Better Animations

> 👻 And More!

> 👻 150 Mods



![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d28737c8a95bedc14f96408e1ce23d03e659ac4.png)



🧛‍♀️ Credits to the Mod Authors on the Mods in this Modpack!
